description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic with usage of Greek/Coptic alphanumerals throughout. Medieval-era. Mentions Naṣr b. [...]; Abū l-Riḍā; "the house/wife of my paternal uncle"; Naʿīm; al-Qazzāz; Umm [...]; Ibn al-Dayyān. Verso is all in Arabic script and appears to be random jottings of letters and some phrases from medical works. There are also two lines in larger script that are crossed out.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
